title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master the art of user interface and experience design using Figma, wireframing, and prototyping.

title: Python for Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Dive deep into data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python, Pandas, and Scikit-learn.

title: Digital Marketing & SEO Strategy
description: Learn modern digital marketing strategies including SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns, and analytics.

title: React & Next.js — The Complete Guide
description: Build production-ready web apps with React 18, Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Understand the core concepts of cybersecurity, ethical hacking, network security, and risk management.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner to Solutions Architect
description: Go from zero to AWS certified — covering EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC, and cloud architecture best practices.

title: Graphic Design with Adobe Illustrator
description: Create stunning logos, icons, and brand identities from scratch using Adobe Illustrator's powerful vector tools.

title: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Build real-world iOS applications using Swift and Xcode, covering UIKit, SwiftUI, and App Store deployment.

title: Machine Learning with TensorFlow
description: Master deep learning, neural networks, computer vision, and NLP using TensorFlow and Keras.

title: DevOps & CI/CD with Docker & Kubernetes
description: Learn containerization, orchestration, and automated deployment pipelines using Docker, Kubernetes, and GitHub Actions.

title: Microsoft Excel — From Beginner to Expert
description: Master Excel formulas, pivot tables, macros, and data visualization to boost your productivity.

title: Content Writing & Copywriting Mastery
description: Learn how to write compelling blog posts, ad copies, email sequences, and landing pages that convert.

title: Blockchain & Web3 Development
description: Build decentralized applications (dApps) using Solidity, Ethereum, Hardhat, and the Web3.js library.

title: Photography for Beginners
description: Learn the fundamentals of photography including composition, lighting, exposure, and post-processing with Lightroom.

title: Project Management with Agile & Scrum
description: Master Agile methodologies, Scrum framework, sprint planning, and team leadership for software projects.
